com.hp.workpath.api.scanner

Class FileOptionsAttributesReader

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.FileOptionsAttributesReader

  • public class FileOptionsAttributesReader
extends java.lang.Object
    Reads attributes from FileOptionsAttributes
    Since:
    API 1

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      FileOptionsAttributesReader(FileOptionsAttributes fileOptionsAttrs)
      Constructor to create new instance of FileOptionsAttributesReader

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      FileOptionsAttributes.OcrLanguage getOcrLanguage()
      Gets OCR language
      FileOptionsAttributes.PdfCompressionMode getPdfCompressionMode()
      Gets PDF compression mode
      java.lang.String getPdfEncryptionPassword()
      Gets PDF encryption password
      FileOptionsAttributes.TiffCompressionMode getTiffCompressionMode()
      Gets TIFF compression mode
      FileOptionsAttributes.XpsCompressionMode getXpsCompressionMode()
      Gets XPS compression mode

    • Constructor Detail

      • FileOptionsAttributesReader

        public FileOptionsAttributesReader(FileOptionsAttributes fileOptionsAttrs)
        Constructor to create new instance of FileOptionsAttributesReader
        Parameters:
        fileOptionsAttrs - The attributes of the file options

        • Ensures that an object reference passed as a parameter to the calling method is not null.

        Since:
        API 1

    • Method Detail

      • getPdfEncryptionPassword

        public java.lang.String getPdfEncryptionPassword()
        Gets PDF encryption password
        Returns:
        String password

        • Return can be null if the PdfEncryptionPassword is null
        • Return can be null if the PdfEncryptionPassword is empty

        Since:
        API 1

      • getOcrLanguage

        public FileOptionsAttributes.OcrLanguage getOcrLanguage()
        Gets OCR language
        Returns:
        OcrLanguage language

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from FileOptionsAttributes.OcrLanguage.

        Since:
        API 1

      • getPdfCompressionMode

        public FileOptionsAttributes.PdfCompressionMode getPdfCompressionMode()
        Gets PDF compression mode
        Returns:
        PdfCompressionMode mode

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from FileOptionsAttributes.PdfCompressionMode.

        Since:
        API 1

      • getTiffCompressionMode

        public FileOptionsAttributes.TiffCompressionMode getTiffCompressionMode()
        Gets TIFF compression mode
        Returns:
        TiffCompressionMode mode

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from FileOptionsAttributes.TiffCompressionMode.

        Since:
        API 1

      • getXpsCompressionMode

        public FileOptionsAttributes.XpsCompressionMode getXpsCompressionMode()
        Gets XPS compression mode
        Returns:
        XpsCompressionMode mode

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from FileOptionsAttributes.XpsCompressionMode.

        Since:
        API 1
